title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 301.561 - Sign required at public motor vehicle auction
text:
301.561.  Sign required at public motor vehicle auction. — Any person or corporation holding a public motor vehicle auction shall display in a conspicuous manner two signs each of which shall bear the following warning in letters at least six inches high:  "Attention Buyers: Vehicles sold at this auction may not have had a safety inspection." The dimensions of each sign shall be at least two feet by two feet.
(L. 1997 H.B. 207) 
Effective 7-01-97
